title: Pulisic goalless streak hits 16, tying career worst
summary: Christian Pulisic extended his goalless streak to 16 games, matching his career worst, after AC Milan's 0-0 draw with Juventus. The poor form raises concerns about the American winger's current condition.
content: Christian Pulisic equaled his worst goalless streak after he was unable to find the back of the net in AC Milan's 0-0 draw with Juventus on Sunday.

zh.title: 普利西克进球荒达16场，平职业生涯最差纪录
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂亚诺·普利西克的进球荒延长至16场，与其职业生涯最差纪录持平，这发生在AC米兰与尤文图斯0-0战平之后。这种糟糕状态引发了对这位美国边锋目前状况的担忧。

title: Wrexham lose to Coventry, cling to playoff places
summary: Wrexham suffered a 3-1 defeat to Coventry City, placing their Championship playoff hopes in jeopardy. The loss came during Coventry's title celebration week.
content: Coventry celebrated their Sky Bet Championship title party with a 3-1 victory that leaves Wrexham's playoff ambitions in the balance.

zh.title: 雷克瑟姆负科文垂，季后赛席位岌岌可危
zh.summary: 雷克瑟姆以3-1不敌科文垂城，使其英超联赛季后赛希望陷入危险。这场失利发生在科文垂庆祝夺冠期间。

title: American Albert, 16, tops Reyna Bundesliga mark
summary: Mathis Albert became the youngest American to debut in the Bundesliga at age 16 years, 11 months, and 5 days playing for Borussia Dortmund. He surpassed the previous American record set by Gio Reyna.
content: Mathis Albert became the youngest American to play in the Bundesliga when he made his debut for Borussia Dortmund on Sunday at the age of 16 years, 11 months and 5 days.

zh.title: 16岁美国人阿尔伯特创德甲美国最年轻纪录，超越雷纳
zh.summary: 马西斯·阿尔伯特以16岁11个月零5天的年纪为多特蒙德效力，成为德甲最年轻的美国首秀球员，打破了吉奥·雷纳之前保持的美国纪录。

title: Chelsea interim boss relieved after FA Cup win
summary: Interim Chelsea coach Calum McFarlane expressed relief after guiding the club to an FA Cup final with a 1-0 semifinal win over Leeds. He took over just three days after Liam Rosenior's dismissal.
content: Chelsea interim coach Calum McFarlane said he felt "relief" after guiding the club to the FA Cup final days with a 1-0 semifinal win against Leeds United, three days after replacing Liam Rosenior following his dismissal after just 106 days in charge.

zh.title: 切尔西临时主帅在足总杯胜利后如释重负
zh.summary: 切尔西临时主教练卡勒姆·麦克法兰在1-0击败利兹联的半决赛中带领球队进入足总杯决赛后表示欣慰。他是在利亚姆·罗森尼奥被撤销后的三天内接手的。

title: Goalkeepers sent off after brawl in Spain's 2nd tier
summary: A Spanish second-division match between Zaragoza and Huesca ended in violence when goalkeeper Esteban Andrada punched defender Jorge Pulido in the face. Andrada received a red card for the incident.
content: A second-division soccer game in Spain ended in a brawl Sunday after Zaragoza goalkeeper Esteban Andrada punched Huesca defender Jorge Pulido in the face.

zh.title: 西班牙第二级别联赛门将因斗殴被罚下
zh.summary: 萨拉戈萨和韦斯卡之间的西班牙第二级别联赛比赛以暴力事件结束，门将埃斯特班·安德拉达用拳头打了后卫豪尔赫·普利多的脸。安德拉达因此事件被罚红牌。

title: FIFA to raise WC prize money amid cost concerns
summary: FIFA plans to increase World Cup prize money following complaints from national associations about rising operational costs at tournaments. The adjustment addresses financial concerns from participating nations.
content: World Cup prize money is set to be increased after concerns were raised by some national associations over high operational costs at the tournament.

zh.title: 国际足联因成本担忧上调世界杯奖金
zh.summary: 国际足联计划在国家协会对赛事运营成本上升的投诉后增加世界杯奖金。该调整解决了参赛国的财务顾虑。

title: Pep gives City license for 'quality time' on break
summary: Pep Guardiola granted Manchester City's players permission to travel and enjoy downtime before the team's final push for trophies. The treble-chasing squad can take a brief break before the crucial period.
content: Pep Guardiola has given his treble-chasing players permission to jet off around the world before Manchester City's final push.

zh.title: 瓜迪奥拉给曼城球员放假享受'高质量休息时间'
zh.summary: 瓜迪奥拉批准曼城球员在球队最后冲刺阶段前可以旅游并享受休闲时光。这支追求三冠王的球队可以在关键时期前休息片刻。

title: Vegan Forest Green deny fan bacon sandwich beef
summary: Forest Green Rovers denied allegations that a rival fan was ejected for eating a bacon sandwich at their stadium. The vegan club addressed questions about their conduct policies.
content: Forest Green Rovers deny rival fan being kicked out for eating a bacon sandwich

zh.title: 素食俱乐部森林绿队否认赶出吃培根三明治球迷的指控
zh.summary: 森林绿队否认了一名对方球迷因在他们的球场上吃培根三明治而被赶出的指控。这家素食俱乐部对其行为政策问题进行了说明。
